name: Rokid NewPipe
summary: Watch YouTube and other NewPipe-supported streams from a HUD-first interface for Rokid glasses
description: Rokid NewPipe is a glasses-focused fork of NewPipe adapted for a 480x640, no-touch Rokid workflow. It keeps the NewPipe streaming core while reshaping home, search, video detail, and player controls around swipe, tap, and Back input on the glasses.

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
# About
Rokid NewPipe adapts NewPipe for Rokid glasses with a HUD-first interface. It is designed for the 480x640 glasses display and direct swipe, tap, and Back navigation instead of phone-style touch screens.

# Key Features
- Rokid-first home screen with search and kiosk categories
- On-screen search keyboard built for one-axis navigation
- Simplified video detail screen for fast playback
- Player action rail for play/pause, quality, speed, subtitles, close, and exit
- High-contrast black surfaces with clear focus outlines for glasses readability
- Optional R08 Access Bridge compatibility for ring navigation

# Controls
- Swipe forward/back to move focus
- Tap/select to activate the focused item
- Back closes action mode, hides the keyboard, or returns to the previous screen

# Notes
- This is a focused Rokid fork, not the upstream NewPipe distribution
- Package name is `com.anezium.rokid.newpipe`
- R08 Access Bridge v1.4.7 or newer can control Rokid NewPipe from an R08 ring

author: Anezium

releases.notes:
Rokid NewPipe 0.28.8 build for Rokid glasses.

Fixes:
- Removes the permanent gray/green veil over fullscreen playback on the glasses' monochrome display: Android was drawing its own default focus highlight over the fullscreen video container once the Rokid focus frame was hidden.
- Clears a stale mini-player overlay that could wash out the video when fullscreen was entered before the bottom sheet finished expanding.

Build: continuous APK, version 0.28.8, versionCode 1013.
changes: Removes the permanent gray/green veil over fullscreen playback on the glasses' monochrome display.
Clears a stale mini-player overlay that could wash out the video when fullscreen was entered before the bottom sheet finished expanding.

releases.notes:
Rokid NewPipe 0.28.8 build for Rokid glasses.

Fixes:
- FULL/fullscreen no longer rotates the app into Android landscape mode on Rokid glasses.
- Removes the green focus frame that could cover the full video viewport in Rokid fullscreen playback.
- Keeps Rokid focus outlines available for real controls and list items.

Build: continuous APK, version 0.28.8, versionCode 1013.
changes: FULL/fullscreen no longer rotates the app into Android landscape mode on Rokid glasses.
Removes the green focus frame that could cover the full video viewport in Rokid fullscreen playback.
Keeps Rokid focus outlines available for real controls and list items.

releases.notes:
Preview build for testing the Rokid fullscreen rotation fix.

Changes:
- The FULL/fullscreen action no longer requests Android landscape orientation in Rokid mode.
- The automatic video-size orientation correction is disabled while Rokid fullscreen is active.

Build: continuous APK, version 0.28.8, versionCode 1013.

Please test tapping FULL on the affected video/glasses setup and confirm whether the video no longer rotates sideways.
changes: The FULL/fullscreen action no longer requests Android landscape orientation in Rokid mode.
The automatic video-size orientation correction is disabled while Rokid fullscreen is active.

releases.notes:
Preview build for testing the Rokid fullscreen fixes.

Changes since preview 1:
- Removes the green Rokid focus frame from the full-screen video viewport.
- Keeps the focus outline available for real controls and list items outside fullscreen playback.

Also includes:
- The FULL/fullscreen action no longer requests Android landscape orientation in Rokid mode.
- Automatic video-size orientation correction is disabled while Rokid fullscreen is active.

Build: continuous APK, version 0.28.8, versionCode 1013.

Please test a 16:9 landscape video with FULL enabled and confirm that it stays upright without the large green viewport border.

releases.notes:
# Rokid NewPipe 0.28.8 - 2026-06-28

Rokid NewPipe is a glasses-focused fork of NewPipe for Rokid devices. This build
keeps the NewPipe streaming core and reshapes the main experience around a
`480x640`, no-touch HUD.

## Highlights

- New green launcher icon and adaptive icon background.
- Fresh screenshots captured from real Rokid glasses.
- Rokid-first home, search, video detail, and player controls.
- One-axis navigation: swipe moves focus, tap activates, Back exits.
- Directional debounce for physical Rokid swipe events that arrive as paired
  key events.
- Black, high-contrast HUD surfaces with outline focus for AR readability.
- README updated with R08 Access Bridge setup notes.

## R08 Access Bridge

R08 Access Bridge `v1.4.7` now includes Rokid NewPipe compatibility. When this
app is active, the bridge sends R08 ring swipes and taps into NewPipe's own
single-axis navigator.

Get it here:
https://github.com/Anezium/R08-Access-Bridge/releases/latest

## Install

1. Install `Rokid-NewPipe-v0.28.8-rokid-20260628.apk` on the glasses.
2. Install or update R08 Access Bridge to `v1.4.7` if you want R08 ring control.
3. Enable the R08 Access Bridge Accessibility Service on the glasses.
4. Pair the R08 ring in Stable mode.
5. Launch Rokid NewPipe.

## Notes

This is not the upstream NewPipe distribution. It is a focused Rokid glasses
build with package name `com.anezium.rokid.newpipe`.

The APK attached to this release is signed with the standard Android debug
certificate for installability. It will not update over the official NewPipe app
and should be treated as a separate community build.
